# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why it is needed.

## Related issue

Link to the issue this PR addresses (required for non-trivial changes):

- Fixes #
- Related to #

## Changes made

Describe the changes clearly (bullets or numbering are both fine).

## Testing

Describe how this change was tested:

- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added or updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing (describe below)

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Docstrings/comments updated (if needed)
- [ ] No documentation changes needed

## Scope check

- [ ] This PR is reasonably scoped and focused
- [ ] This PR does not introduce unnecessary dependencies
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly documented (if any)

## Sensitive data / PHI check

- [ ] This PR does **not** include protected health information (PHI) or other sensitive personal data
- [ ] Any examples or logs are synthetic or minimized

## Additional notes

Anything else the maintainer should know when reviewing this PR.
